home.title: AlloyForge Fasteners | High-Temperature Alloy Fasteners
home.description: High-temperature alloy bolts, studs, nuts, washers and custom components for heat, pressure and corrosion-critical industrial applications.

quote.title: Request a Quote | AlloyForge Fasteners
quote.description: Request a quotation for standard or custom high-temperature alloy bolts, studs, nuts, washers and components.

hero.title: Alloy Fasteners for Heat, Pressure & Corrosion.
hero.copy: Bolts, studs, nuts, washers and custom components in nickel-based and high-performance alloys.

products.photoAlt: Alloy bolts, studs, nuts and washers arranged for inspection

cards.name: Bolts
cards.copy: Hex, socket and special-head bolts for high-temperature assemblies.

cards.name: Stud Bolts
cards.copy: Full-thread, double-end and application-specific stud configurations.

cards.name: Nuts
cards.copy: Hex, heavy hex and special nuts matched to alloy and thread requirements.

cards.name: Washers
cards.copy: Flat and custom-profile washers for load distribution and corrosion resistance.

cards.name: Custom Components
cards.copy: Non-standard geometry, special threads and low-volume trial requirements based on your drawing.

materials.title: Alloys selected for severe service conditions.
materials.note: Final material selection, certification and test scope are confirmed against each purchase specification.

slides.name: Inconel 625
slides.copy: Strong resistance to seawater, chloride environments and elevated-temperature oxidation.
slides.imageAlt: Nickel alloy fasteners on a machined metal surface

slides.name: Inconel 718
slides.copy: High strength and creep resistance for loaded assemblies at elevated temperatures.
slides.review: Strength condition, thread and test scope
slides.imageAlt: Assorted alloy bolts, studs, nuts and washers

slides.name: Hastelloy C276
slides.copy: Broad corrosion resistance for aggressive chemical processing environments.
slides.imageAlt: Alloy fastener inspection in a quality laboratory

slides.name: Other Performance Alloys
slides.copy: Monel, titanium, duplex and additional grades reviewed against the operating requirement.
slides.review: Specified per drawing or material standard
slides.imageAlt: Special alloy fasteners prepared for industrial supply

capabilities.title: Quote against the drawing, standard, thread and quantity you actually need.
capabilities.copy: Manufacturing and secondary processing can be coordinated through qualified supply partners. The proposed route, inspection scope and documentation are confirmed with the quotation.

items.name: Technical drawing review
items.copy: Dimensions, tolerances, thread form, material condition and order quantity.

items.name: Machining and thread production
items.copy: Turning, thread rolling or cutting selected to suit the grade and specification.

items.name: Heat and surface treatment
items.copy: Coordinated when required by the material, service environment or purchase order.

items.name: Inspection and documentation
items.copy: Traceability, dimensional records and test reports aligned with the quoted scope.

items.name: Packing and shipment records
items.copy: Labels, cartons, pallets and export documents prepared for the destination.

quality.title: Documentation aligned with the order requirement.
quality.copy: Inspection and certification are quoted according to the applicable standard, drawing and purchaser requirement. Available scope can include:
quality.photoAlt: Dimensional inspection of an alloy bolt in a quality laboratory
quality.note: Testing and reports are provided when specified and confirmed with the order.

industries.title: Relevant to heat, pressure and corrosion-critical equipment.
industries.note: Application suitability is reviewed against the buyer's engineering specification.

panels.name: Energy & Petrochemical
panels.copy: Fasteners for valves, pumps, flanges and process systems exposed to loaded service.

panels.name: Chemical Processing
panels.copy: Nickel alloy requirements for chemical, chloride and corrosion-critical environments.

panels.name: Marine & Offshore
panels.copy: Material options for seawater-adjacent equipment and offshore maintenance programs.

panels.name: Power Generation
panels.copy: Bolting for thermal equipment, plant maintenance and engineered high-temperature assemblies.

company.title: A clear route from technical requirement to export-ready fasteners.
company.copy: AlloyForge supports international buyers with drawing-based review, alloy sourcing, coordinated processing, inspection and export documentation for demanding fastener requirements.
company.photoAlt: High-temperature alloy fasteners prepared for export supply
bullets: Standard parts and drawing-based custom components
Nickel alloy and high-performance material sourcing
Coordinated processing, inspection and export documentation
company.processCopy: Each stage is confirmed against the drawing, purchase specification and required documentation.

steps.name: Upload Drawing
steps.copy: Send the specification, drawing, material and required quantity.

steps.name: Technical Review
steps.copy: Confirm geometry, alloy condition, testing scope and manufacturing feasibility.

steps.name: Quotation
steps.copy: Receive the proposed supply scope, pricing, lead time and commercial terms.

steps.name: Production & QC
steps.copy: Coordinate manufacturing, dimensional inspection, testing and traceability records.

steps.name: Shipment
steps.copy: Prepare protected export packing, labels and destination-ready delivery documents.

rfqCta.title: Send the requirement. Expect a response within one business day.
rfqCta.copy: Upload a drawing or enter the standard, material, size, quantity and required testing.

footer.copy: High-temperature alloy fasteners for international industrial procurement.

quotePage.copy: Submit a standard fastener requirement or upload drawings for a custom component review.

aside.title: Enough detail for a useful quotation.
aside.copy: Material, size, quantity and destination are the essentials. Add the standard, testing and drawing where available.
